分析范围限定：不涉及市场份额、产品优劣或行业景气度分析。
判断依据限定：对市场观点的判断仅基于收入与占比数据。
分析内容要求：必须包含中国区收入与全球总收入的提取与口径一致性确认、占比计算及同比变动、中国与全球收入增速对比、市场观点判断、中国相关风险披露提取与解释、中国收入韧性驱动因素判断。

title: Synopsys中国区收入风险敞口分析

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] Synopsys中国区收入风险敞口分析万户级计划已制定，1:10分解口径已建立。

tumen_quota.name: Synopsys 10-K数据提取与口径核验
tumen_quota.objective: 从Synopsys的2024财年10-K与2025财年10-K中提取中国区域收入与公司全球总收入，确认两期披露口径一致。若公司调整了地区划分、披露方式或分类口径，需指出变化点并说明如何保证可比性。

outputs.口径一致性核验报告: 包含变化点说明及可比性保证方式

tumen_quota.time_rhythm: 在收到上级指令后，应在规定周期内完成数据提取与口径核验，并提交阶段性报告。

tumen_quota.name: 中国区收入敞口量化与变化分解
tumen_quota.objective: 基于已提取数据，计算2024财年与2025财年中国收入占全球总收入的比例及同比变动基点；计算中国收入同比增速与全球收入同比增速及其差异；对市场观点（出口管制与国产替代已导致Synopsys在中国的收入出现结构性下滑）作出结论性判断（证伪或证实），判据仅来自收入与占比数据。
inputs: Synopsys 10-K数据提取与口径核验的输出数据

outputs.市场观点结论性判断: 证伪或证实，并说明判据

tumen_quota.time_rhythm: 在完成数据提取后，应在规定周期内完成量化分析与变化分解，并提交阶段性报告。

tumen_quota.name: 中国区收入风险披露与韧性解释
tumen_quota.objective: 从两期10-K中各提取一条与中国相关的关键风险披露或限制因素表述，解释其可能对应的收入变化方向；结合公司对收入确认、合同期限、客户集中度或未履约义务等披露，判断中国收入韧性更接近哪一种驱动（存量续费与维护为主 或 新增授权与新增项目为主），并给出判断依据。
inputs: Synopsys 10-K数据提取与口径核验的输出数据

outputs.2024财年中国相关关键风险披露: 文本及收入变化方向解释
outputs.2025财年中国相关关键风险披露: 文本及收入变化方向解释
outputs.中国收入韧性驱动类型判断: 存量续费/新增授权，并附依据

tumen_quota.time_rhythm: 在完成数据提取后，应在规定周期内完成风险披露与韧性解释，并提交阶段性报告。

updates.decomposition_rule: 万户级任务将进一步分解为千户级（1:10），千户级分解为百户级（1:10），百户级分解为十户级（1:10），确保各级任务目标与上级保持一致，且总和覆盖上级目标。
updates.reporting_cycle: 各万户级任务完成后，需提交阶段性成果报告。千户、百户、十户级任务完成后，需逐级上报，最终汇总至万户级。

meta.stage_description: 中枢将征调令转成万户级配额与节奏计划。

title: Synopsys中国区收入风险敞口分析

agent_trace.summary: [已分配] 万户任务已分解为10个千户子任务，等待执行。

mingghan_allocations.task: Locate 2024 Synopsys 10-K and extract China/Global revenue from geographical segment disclosure.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Obtain raw China and global revenue figures for FY2024.

mingghan_allocations.task: Locate 2025 Synopsys 10-K and extract China/Global revenue from geographical segment disclosure.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Obtain raw China and global revenue figures for FY2025.

mingghan_allocations.task: Compare 2024 and 2025 10-K geographical revenue disclosures for caliber consistency, identify changes, and assess comparability.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Ensure data comparability across periods by identifying and addressing any disclosure changes.

mingghan_allocations.task: Calculate China revenue as a percentage of global total for FY2024 and FY2025.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Quantify China's contribution to global revenue for both fiscal years.

mingghan_allocations.task: Calculate the year-over-year basis point change in China revenue's proportion of global total revenue.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Measure the shift in China's revenue share relative to the global total.

mingghan_allocations.task: Calculate year-over-year growth rates for both China revenue and global total revenue.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Determine the growth dynamics for both China and global revenue streams.

mingghan_allocations.task: Quantify the difference between China and global revenue YoY growth rates and make an initial judgment on relative performance.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Assess whether China revenue is outperforming or underperforming the company overall based on growth rates.

mingghan_allocations.task: Based *only* on the extracted revenue and proportion data, make a conclusive judgment on the market view regarding structural decline, clearly stating criteria.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Validate or invalidate the market hypothesis of structural decline using quantitative revenue and proportion data.

mingghan_allocations.task: Extract one China-related key risk disclosure from each 2024 and 2025 10-K, and explain its potential revenue change direction.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Identify and interpret qualitative risk factors related to China and their potential impact on revenue.

mingghan_allocations.task: Analyze 10-K disclosures (revenue recognition, contract terms, customer concentration, or unfulfilled obligations) to determine if China revenue resilience is primarily driven by existing renewals/maintenance or new licenses/projects.
mingghan_allocations.objective: Characterize the fundamental drivers of China revenue resilience based on company disclosures.

updates.risks: 在定位和从Synopsys的2024财年和2025财年10-K文件中准确提取地理分布收入数据、风险披露以及收入确认相关细节时，可能会遇到挑战。

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

title: Synopsys中国区收入风险敞口分析

agent_trace.summary: [已分配] Synopsys中国区收入风险敞口分析任务已分解为10个百户子任务并完成分配。

jaghun_allocations.Description: Locate and obtain the full 2024 fiscal year 10-K filing for Synopsys Inc. from SEC EDGAR or similar reliable sources.
Locate and obtain the full 2025 fiscal year 10-K filing for Synopsys Inc. from SEC EDGAR or similar reliable sources.
From the 2024 10-K filing, identify and extract the reported revenue for the China region and the company's total global revenue.
From the 2025 10-K filing, identify and extract the reported revenue for the China region and the company's total global revenue.
Compare the geographic segment reporting methodologies and definitions between the 2024 and 2025 10-K filings to ensure consistency or identify any changes in disclosure scope/methodology.

jaghun_allocations.Task Name: Calculate China Revenue Proportion & Basis Point Change
jaghun_allocations.Description: Calculate China revenue as a percentage of global revenue for both 2024 and 2025, and determine the year-over-year basis point change in this proportion.

jaghun_allocations.Task Name: Calculate China vs. Global Revenue Growth & Difference
jaghun_allocations.Description: Calculate the year-over-year growth rate for China revenue and global revenue, then quantify the difference to assess if China revenue is outperforming or underperforming overall company growth.

jaghun_allocations.Task Name: Conclude on Market View Re: China Revenue
jaghun_allocations.Description: Based solely on the extracted revenue and proportion data, provide a conclusive judgment (falsify or confirm) on the market view regarding structural decline in Synopsys's China revenue due to export controls and domestic substitution.
From both the 2024 and 2025 10-K filings, extract one key risk disclosure or limiting factor statement related to China and explain its potential impact on revenue changes.

Analyze company disclosures related to revenue recognition, contract duration, customer concentration, or unfulfilled obligations to determine if China revenue resilience is primarily driven by existing renewals/maintenance or new authorizations/projects. Provide judgment and supporting basis.

updates.progress: All 10 hundred-household sub-tasks have been allocated.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] 百户任务已按1:10分解为十个十户子任务，并完成分配。

arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Extract China revenue and global total revenue from Synopsys 2024 10-K geographic segment table.
Extract China revenue and global total revenue from Synopsys 2025 10-K geographic segment table.
Confirm disclosure consistency between 2024 and 2025 10-K geographic segments. If changes are identified, document them and explain how comparability is ensured.
Calculate China revenue as a percentage of global total revenue for fiscal year 2024.
Calculate China revenue as a percentage of global total revenue for fiscal year 2025.
Calculate the year-over-year basis point change in China revenue's percentage of global total revenue.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Calculate China & Global Revenue Growth Rates
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Calculate the Year-over-Year (YoY) growth rate for China revenue and the YoY growth rate for global total revenue.
Quantify the difference between China and global revenue YoY growth rates, and conclude whether China revenue is outperforming or underperforming the company overall.

arban_allocations.SUMMARY: Validate Market View on China Revenue
arban_allocations.DESCRIPTION: Based *only* on extracted revenue and percentage data, make a conclusive judgment (falsify or verify) on the market view that export controls and domestic substitution have led to a structural decline in Synopsys's China revenue.

1. Extract one China-related key risk disclosure or limiting factor statement from both the 2024 and 2025 10-K filings. Explain the potential direction of revenue change corresponding to each disclosure. 2. Based on company disclosures regarding revenue recognition, contract duration, customer concentration, or unfulfilled obligations, judge whether China revenue resilience is primarily driven by ① existing renewals and maintenance or ② new licenses and new projects. Provide the judgment and its supporting basis.
